title: Minecraft but you Can't Mine or Craft
description: Beat the game without the ability to mine or craft!
body:
![Background, blue sky with clouds. Minecraft logo is in center. The words "Mine" and "craft" are crossed out with 2 big red X's](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51a5bf2bb11bec9d09ec7984a993e675ba80c3eb.png)

## Overview
In this beat the game challenge, your abilities to mine and craft are totally disabled! You can still place blocks.

Everything required to reach the End and kill the Ender Dragon is doable _except_ for getting blaze powder & eyes of ender. To this end an extra recipe is available for villager clerics, who will offer 2 eyes of ender in exchange for 2 ender pearls and 1 blaze rod.

If you'd like to make a video or content using this pack, go for it! If you do so, you must provide credit to me (Ambiguous Chameleon) and provide a link to this pack in the description and/or comments. Thank you!

## Cheats & Commands

**Uninstalls the data pack** _[data pack version only!]_

```
/function ac_cheat:uninstall
```
